findings.issue: No rate limiting or alert storm protection
findings.fix: Added per-source cooldown 30s, global throttle 10/sec, dedup with 60s window

findings.issue: No failure mode for alert database itself
findings.fix: Python logging fallback + UI stale indicator + 60s health check

findings.issue: No sanitization of Alert.detail before WebSocket broadcast
findings.fix: Sanitize: strip API keys, file paths, truncate HTTP bodies to 200 chars

findings.issue: Shadow step skip scenario missing from coverage table
Static severity assignments — no escalation on repetition

post_fix_review: frequency escalation off-by-one bug found and fixed (WARN timestamps now tracked outside 60s dedup guard)
